'''Elrooden''' was the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Elrood/Legends|Elrood]], a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. The [[Elrood Bazaar]] was held here.

{{City-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
[[Star Wars Adventure Journal 6|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 6]] refers to the city as Eldrooden.
